title: Create signal_generator.py
description: Implement daily signal evaluation using the 5 validated entry conditions. Read pre-computed characteristics, apply entry rules, rank candidates, output signal list.

title: Create portfolio.py
description: Position tracking: entry, exit (profit target, hard stop, time stop, trailing stop), position sizing (equal weight with regime multiplier), risk limits (daily/weekly loss, max drawdown), P&L tracking.

title: Create main.py daily run loop
description: Orchestrate daily execution: fetch data → compute characteristics → evaluate signals → update portfolio → generate report. Weekly rebalance on Friday.

title: Create dashboard.py Streamlit UI
description: Web dashboard showing: current signals ranked, open positions with P&L, performance metrics (equity curve, drawdown), regime indicator, last updated timestamp.

title: Integration test
description: Run full daily cycle: fetch data, generate signals, simulate 1 week of trading. Verify output matches expected format. Check error handling.

title: Lint and finalize
description: Run Python linting, verify all modules import correctly, check for hardcoded paths, ensure all parameters are configurable.
